results.title: The Best Call Recording Apps of 2026: A Complete Guide - Allo
excerpts:
Section Title: Best Call Recording Software of 2026: Top Picks & Features
Content:
We've tested and reviewed the top recording software. Included: Allo, Cube ACR, Gong.io, and more.
María Correa
[](https://www.linkedin.com/in/maria-correa-diaz/)
Content Manager | SMB and VoIP expert
Updated on Mar 19, 2026
A few years ago, only large enterprises could afford [call recording tools](https://www.withallo.com/features/call-recording) .
Now, they are not just accessible to everyone; they come with innovations in AI and mobile technology that make these solutions perfect for everyone, from SMBs to individual professionals.
Key benefits include:
Automatic call transcription for follow-ups
Enhanced productivity through AI call summaries
Legal compliance and security features
*Ready to find the perfect call recording solution?*
We've done the research for you. This guide compares the leading call recording tools available today, helping you make an informed choice in 2025.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > Best call recorder app for iPhone: [**Allo**](https://www.withallo.com/)
Content:
**Platform:** iPhone & Android
**Why it’s the best:** Allo stands out because it’s more than just a call recorder—it’s a complete [business phone system](https://www.withallo.com/features/voip-phone-system-for-small-business) designed for small businesses and entrepreneurs. Its AI-powered call recording automatically transcribes conversations, making it easy to revisit, analyze, and review key details of important discussions. Unlike traditional iPhone recording apps that require complicated workarounds, Allo’s process is seamless, capturing both inbound and outbound calls automatically. There’s no need for complicated setup or extra equipment, it records calls automatically. The app prioritizes privacy and security, ensuring that recorded conversations stay encrypted and are easily retrievable through a clean, searchable dashboard.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > Best call recorder app for Android: [Cube ACR](https://cubeacr.app/?ref=blog.withallo.com)
Content:
Cube ACR app.
**Platform:** Android
**Why it’s the best:** Cube ACR is widely regarded as the most reliable and versatile call recorder for Android users. Its ability to record calls across multiple platforms, including traditional phone lines, VoIP apps (like WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Skype), and online meeting apps, gives it a major edge over its competitors. With features like automatic call recording, custom lists for specific contacts, and secure cloud backups, Cube ACR is ideal for both personal and professional use. What truly sets it apart is its real-time caller identification, helping users decide whether to record or reject the call based on the context.
**Unique feature:** Cloud integration ensures that all your recordings are automatically saved and can be accessed from any device, even if you switch phones.
Section Title: ... > **Best Sales Call Recording Software:** [**Gong.io**](http://gong.io/?ref=blog.withallo.com)
Content:
Gong call recording.
**Platform:** Web-based.
**Why it’s the best:** Gong.io helps sales teams optimize their operations by turning every call into actionable data. Unlike generic call recorders, Gong goes beyond simply recording conversations—it analyzes them using AI to identify sales patterns, successful tactics, and areas for improvement. It listens for key phrases, tone, and objections, providing reps with in-the-moment suggestions on how to pivot conversations to close deals. The tool is invaluable for coaching, helping sales managers provide feedback based on actual performance rather than assumptions. **‍**
**Unique feature:** Real-time coaching during calls ensures that reps don’t miss opportunities to overcome objections or upsell.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > **Best VoIP Call Recorder:** [**Rev**](https://www.rev.com/apps-and-tools/call-recorder-app...
Content:
Rev dashboard.
**Platform:** iOS
**Why it’s the best:** Rev excels at providing high-quality recordings of VoIP calls, making it a favorite for users who rely on apps like Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Skype. What makes Rev particularly impressive is its clean interface and user-friendly design—there’s no need for complicated setups or extra equipment. Simply launch the app, and it records calls automatically. It’s perfect for journalists, podcasters, and business professionals who need precise, shareable transcripts for interviews or meetings. The app also allows users to trim and edit recordings before sharing them via email, cloud storage, or text.
**Unique feature:** A completely free plan with no ads or time limits makes it accessible for both personal and professional users.

results.title: Wave AI Note Taker & Recorder - App Store - Apple
excerpts:
Section Title: Wave AI Note Taker & Recorder > Transcribe Voice Memo, Meeting
Content:
Wave AI Note Taker: Audio and Phone Call Recorder for Transcription, Note-Taking & More Whether you're in a business meeting, classroom lecture, or on a call, Wave ensures you never miss a crucial detail. With its seamless background audio recording, intelligent summaries, and powerful AI transcription, Wave simplifies meetings for maximum productivity. Put AI into action today to capture, organize, and share your conversations.
Section Title: Wave AI Note Taker & Recorder > Transcribe Voice Memo, Meeting
Content:
WHAT CUSTOMERS SAY "Honestly don't know how this app can do such a good job with taking notes of technical stuff and acronyms and things, but it does." "Wave took down the people names, and somehow they were able to tell who is who when they spoke and they would put down the person name and 98 times out of 100 they were correct." "Wave did capture all notes from the last two very complex design sessions and it very neatly clearly succinctly gave me a summary with next steps in the way it organized the notes was fantastic." KEY FEATURES OF WAVE AI Audio Recording & Transcription - Wave works in the background, continuously capturing conversations without interrupting your workflow. Ideal for in-person meetings, lectures, and personal notes. - Convert your recorded audio or phone calls into accurate, shareable text. Perfect for meetings, interviews, and dictation. Say goodbye to manually taking notes.

results.title: Best Offline Meeting Recorder App for iPhone in 2026 - Speakwise Blog
excerpts:
Section Title: Best Offline Meeting Recorder App for iPhone in 2026 > ... > Key Features
Content:
✅ **Discrete Recording** : Place your iPhone face-down on a table and let it capture. No visible recording indicators, no bulky microphones, no laptops—just a phone that looks like any other phone sitting on a desk.
 ... 
Section Title: Best Offline Meeting Recorder App for iPhone in 2026 > ... > Limitations
Content:
❌ iOS only — no Android or desktop version
❌ No Zoom/Teams bot integration (designed for in-person recording)
❌ Individual-focused — no team collaboration features
 ... 
Section Title: ... > 4. Notta – Best for Cross-Platform Users Who Need Some Offline Capability
Content:
Notta is a cross-platform transcription app with a mobile offering that supports limited offline recording. While its core strength lies in real-time cloud-based transcription, the mobile app can capture audio without connectivity and process it once you reconnect. Notta supports 58 languages and offers AI summaries, making it a competent option for users who split their time between mobile and desktop workflows. The cross-platform availability is Notta's key differentiator—if your team uses a mix of iOS and Android devices and you need a single transcription solution that works across all of them, Notta covers that ground.
Section Title: Best Offline Meeting Recorder App for iPhone in 2026 > ... > Key Features
Content:
✅ **58 Language Support** : One of the widest language selections available, useful for multilingual offline meetings
✅ **Real-Time Transcription** : When online, provides live transcription during meetings
✅ **AI Summaries** : Generates meeting summaries and highlights key points (requires cloud processing)
✅ **Screen Recording** : Capture both audio and screen content during presentations
✅ **Cross-Platform** : Available on iOS, Android, web, and Chrome extension
 ... 
Section Title: Best Offline Meeting Recorder App for iPhone in 2026 > ... > Best For
Content:
✅ Users who need both iOS and Android support
✅ Multilingual teams working across 58 languages
✅ Professionals who want AI summaries but also use desktop workflows

results.title: Best 3 AI Notetakers for Iphone in 2025 | Jamie
excerpts:
Section Title: Best 3 AI Notetakers for Iphone in 2025 > **Jamie** > Capture any meeting on iPhone, even offline
Content:
It works even when you're offline (which saved me more times than I can count). Once you're back online, it turns all that audio into a transcript, summary, and even pulls out tasks for you. Just so you know, it can't record actual phone calls on iOS because of rules, but honestly, that covers most of my meeting needs anyway.
 ... 
Section Title: Best 3 AI Notetakers for Iphone in 2025 > **Notion**
Content:
**Best for:** Individuals and teams needing an all-in-one notes and docs workspace
**Similar to:** Evernote, Microsoft OneNote
**App Store rating:** 4.8/5
Source: Notion
Notion is an all-in-one workspace app for notes, documents, tasks, and databases with built-in AI capabilities. It allows users to capture notes, manage projects, and collaborate in one place, across web and mobile apps.
Notion’s AI can transcribe and summarize meeting calls (Zoom, Teams, etc.) right inside your notes, with no meeting bot required. It also generates action items from discussions and lets you query your notes in natural language to find past details.
Up next, we look at who uses Notion and the key features it offers.
 ... 
Section Title: Best 3 AI Notetakers for Iphone in 2025 > **Wave**
Content:
**Best for:** Mobile users recording meetings, calls, or lectures for transcription
**Similar to:** Otter.ai, Notta
**App Store rating:** 4.9/5
Source: Wave AI
Wave is an AI note-taking app for iOS and Android that records meetings, phone calls, and other conversations. It captures audio at the press of a button and uses AI to transcribe the recording and generate a written summary.
All recordings and transcripts are saved securely and synced across your iPhone, Android, and a web app for access anywhere. The app can even record in the background (with the screen off) and supports offline use, transcribing once you’re back online.
Next, we break down who typically uses Wave and its main features.
Section Title: Best 3 AI Notetakers for Iphone in 2025 > **Wave** > **Who is it for?**
Content:
Wave is geared toward people who need to capture and revisit spoken information on the go. It’s commonly used by journalists recording interviews, students capturing lectures, and business professionals in meetings or phone calls who want an automatic transcript and summary of what was said.
Section Title: Best 3 AI Notetakers for Iphone in 2025 > **Wave** > **Key Features**
Content:
**One-Tap Recording** : Records meetings, phone calls, and in-person conversations with a single tap.
**AI Transcription** : Converts speech to text in real time with high accuracy and speaker-labeled transcripts.
**Automatic Summaries** : Generates a concise, searchable summary of each recording that you can edit or export.
**Cross-Device Sync** : Access your recordings, transcriptions, and summaries on iOS, Android, or any computer via the web app (all data stays synced).
**Extra Tools** : Includes meeting app integrations, background recording (record while using other apps or screen off), and the ability to import audio files for transcription.

results.title: Best Voice Recorder Apps for iPhone (2025): 5 Picks Compared
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > Let’s compare the options
Content:
| Evaluation criteria | Apple Voice Memos | Letterly | Otter | Dolby On | Notta |
| **Recording quality** | Built-in recorder with “Enhance Recording” noise reduction | Standard iPhone recording, plus screen-off/background capture | Meeting-focused recording (quality depends on mic) | Auto studio sound (noise reduction, EQ, limiting) | Standard recording |
| **Reliability** | Very reliable system app | Stable offline recording + screen-off recording + stable file import workflow | Stable for meeting capture + live transcription | One-tap recording + built-in editor | Stable file import workflow |
| **Organization** | Folders, search, favorites | Tags + search by keywords | Folders for conversations | One-tap recording + built-in editor | Central transcript workspace |
| **Usage on different devices** | Apple ecosystem | iOS, Android, Web, macOS | iOS + Android, macOS | Web + iOS + Android | Web + iOS + Android |

results.title: Top 5 iOS Transcription & Voice Recorder Apps That Actually Capture Everything (2025) | by JOHN WOOD | Medium
excerpts:
Sitemap
[Open in app](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.medium.reader&referrer=utm_source%3DmobileNavBar&source=post_page---top_nav_layout_nav-----------------------------------------)
Write
Search
Section Title: ... > Because missing the key sentence shouldn’t cost you a meeting, a grade, or a headline.
Content:
JOHN WOOD
5 min read
·
Oct 13, 2025
--
Listen
Share
Introduction Whether you’re a student, journalist, creator, or team lead, great audio tools should disappear into your workflow — record fast, transcribe accurately, and summarize clearly. I lived with five iOS recorder/transcription apps across interviews, lectures, and brainstorming sessions. I judged them on capture reliability, transcription quality, privacy, and small affordances that make daily recording frictionless. Four well‑known picks lead this list; I close with Voix, which leans into speed, privacy-first processing, and AI summarization.
Section Title: ... > How I evaluated
Content:
Capture reliability: One‑tap start, background safety (screen lock, switching apps), and file integrity.
Transcription quality and speed: Clear text with minimal cleanup and fast turnaround.
Privacy and control: On‑device processing options and data ownership.
Workflow fit: Editing basics, organization, notifications, widgets/shortcuts, and Apple features like Live Activity/Dynamic Island.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > 5. Voix — Record & AI Transcribe (privacy‑first speed with summaries) Link: https://apps.ap...
Content:
Press enter or click to view image in full size
Why it stands out According to its App Store description, Voix focuses on fast recording, on‑device privacy, and AI that works for you after capture. You can start recording instantly from the app, Control Center, widgets, the Action Button, or Siri Shortcuts. With Live Activity and Dynamic Island, recording continues safely in the background — even with the phone locked.
Section Title: ... > Verified highlights from the App Store page
Content:
AI‑powered transcription: Choose from three transcription methods to balance accuracy and speed. Smart AI summaries: Get concise summaries of your transcripts and control how detailed they are. Background‑safe capture: Live Activity + Dynamic Island keep recording going while locked or multitasking. Quick start everywhere: Control Center, Widgets, Action Button, and Siri Shortcuts for hands‑free start/stop. On‑device processing: Privacy‑first design — recordings and transcriptions can stay on your phone without the cloud. Built‑in editing: Trim, crop, and clean up audio without leaving the app. Organization: Foldering, naming, sorting to keep sessions tidy. Customization: Adjust recording quality, file formats, and summary styles. Notifications: Get alerted when transcription and summarization finish. What’s New (v1.0.4, Mar 25, 2025): Shortcut support for Action Button and Siri to toggle recording.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > Verified highlights from the App Store page
Content:
Summary Great audio tools should reduce friction, not add it. If speed and privacy matter — and you want transcripts plus summaries without babysitting the process — Voix hits a sweet spot with on‑device processing, background‑safe capture, and flexible AI options. For team workflows, searchable archives, or human‑grade transcripts, the other picks fit those jobs. Choose the one that matches how you actually record and review — then stick with it for a week and let the right tool do the work.
--
--
